branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Black-hole horizon threshold. Defect compactness C = r_s / r_core controls whether the relational defect is in the BH state. Both canonical regimes P1 and P2' satisfy C >> 1 with a small core ratio r_core/r_s well inside the horizon, so both register as compactness-transitioned BLACK_HOLE states.

definitions.is_BH: True if r_core <= r_s and the full Schwarzschild metric is reproduced inside r_s

framing: The horizon condition is a compactness transition of a relational defect, not an imposed GR horizon. The two regimes pass independently with sub-percent core/horizon ratios.
